# Center

Centers its children both horizontally and vertically.

## Import

```jsx
import { Center, AbsoluteCenter, Circle, Square } from "@onlinesales-ai/ui";
```

## Components

### Center

Centers children using flexbox.

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| children | `ReactNode` | - | Content to center |

### AbsoluteCenter

Centers children using absolute positioning.

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| axis | `"horizontal" \| "vertical" \| "both"` | `both` | Centering axis |

### Circle

Renders a circle (centered Box with equal width/height and borderRadius).

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| size | `string \| number` | - | Width and height |

### Square

Renders a square (centered Box with equal width/height).

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| size | `string \| number` | - | Width and height |

## Usage

```jsx
<Center h="100px" bg="gray.100">
  Centered content
</Center>

<Circle size="40px" bg="primary.500" color="white">
  <Icon />
</Circle>
```
